reference: I have a group of very small, painless bumps at the base of my penis. I have been tested for any sexually transmitted diseases, and the results were negative, but the doctor said that he was seeing signs of herpes. I had the bumps removed using carbon dioxide laser treatment, and they have come back months later in the same spot. Is this herpes?
